Research Capacity Finder
Research Capacity Building in Social Care
Social Care  ·  England

Research capacity building, available for those who work in social care and social work in England.

A guide to research capacity building opportunities, from first exposure to research through to research leadership, for people who work across social care and social work in England. Available now.

New here? Use the Guided finder to answer a couple of questions and get matched to the right opportunities. Already know your stage? Browse the map to see everything at once and filter by stage and region.

For those who work in any area of social care or social work with children, families, adults and communities, within a range of organisations such as a local authority, a care home, or a voluntary, community and social enterprise provider.

Interested in finding out more about research training and capacity building? Ask yourself:

? {{ q.q }}

If you answered yes to any of these, find out more about the national and regional opportunities available, whether you are completely new to research or want to become a research leader in your organisation and the wider sector.
